message:
feat(plan): add mission failure taxonomy with terminality and retryability contracts

Extends the mission planning system with structured failure classification
(+627 lines) enabling the control plane to make deterministic retry and
escalation decisions:

- MissionFailureCode enum: PolicyDenied, ReservationConflict, RateLimited,
  StaleState, DispatchError, ApprovalRequired, ApprovalDenied,
  ApprovalExpired — covers all observed mission abort reasons
- MissionFailureTerminality: Terminal (mission cannot recover) vs
  NonTerminal (may succeed after corrective action)
- MissionFailureRetryability: Never, Immediate, AfterBackoff,
  AfterStateRefresh, AfterApprovalRefresh — guides automated retry policy
- MissionFailureContract: bundles reason_code, error_code, terminality,
  retryability, human_hint, and machine_hint into a single structured
  failure report for both operator UX and programmatic consumption
- MissionFailureCode::ALL constant array for exhaustive iteration
- Each failure code maps to a default (terminality, retryability) pair
  that the control plane can override per-mission

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
